carbon-black.description: Deepest dark gray used as the primary canvas backdrop.

carbon-black-2.description: Secondary dark gray for alternating section backgrounds and subtle containers.

graphite.description: Prominent surface and primary container background color, maintaining structural weight.

graphite-light.description: Lighter graphite variant for nested card headers, borders, and hover states.

alabaster-grey.description: Cool slate-gray used for secondary typography, sub-headers, and platform badges.

bright-snow.description: Pure cool white used for primary text and high-importance headings.

slate-violet.description: Sophisticated, low-saturation slate-violet gray for subtle active indicators and focus rings.

slate-violet-light.description: Lighter slate-violet gray for hover states and secondary active indicators.

platinum-silver.description: Premium cool platinum silver for primary actions, buttons, and high-contrast borders.

platinum-silver-light.description: Bright platinum for hover states of primary elements.

muted-green.description: Understated, low-saturation sage green representing success or active status without flashiness.

muted-green-light.description: Lighter muted green for success notification hover states.

base.role: Deep page backdrop, canvas foundations, and global layout wrapper.

alternate.role: Slightly elevated section wrappers, alternating cards, and minor section offsets.

primary.role: Primary structural containers: game cards, career accordion items, modal bodies, and panels.

secondary.role: Nested panels, active states, and elevated hover surfaces.

primary.role: Main headings, titles, primary navigation items, and high-visibility body text.

muted.role: Secondary paragraphs, metadata, labels, platform badges, and helper copy.

disabled.role: Placeholder text, inactive menu items, and disabled form elements.

subtle.role: Extremely soft dividers, panel boundaries, and default card borders.

strong.role: Interactive focus boundaries, table headers, and defined container edges.

interactive.role: Focused element outlines, active input boundaries, and hover card borders.

primary.role: Primary active brand accent for primary call-to-actions, hero graphic highlights, and critical buttons.

primary-hover.role: Hover states for primary buttons and high-contrast links.

secondary.role: Secondary brand accent for stats, high-tech features, category tags, and focus rings.

secondary-hover.role: Hover states for secondary interactives and cyber elements.

success.role: Green indicator for success states, completed job postings, active servers, and positive ratings.

success-hover.role: Hover states for success buttons and glowing green accents.

thumb.role: Native scrollbar thumb color, blending beautifully with the dark background.

track.role: Native scrollbar track color, ensuring the scrollbar matches the canvas.

platinum-silver-on-carbon-black.usage: Outstanding contrast. Perfect for primary buttons and text callouts.

slate-violet-light-on-carbon-black.usage: Excellent for secondary interactive elements and text indicators.

slate-violet-on-carbon-black.status: AA Pass (Large Text / Graphical Elements Only)
slate-violet-on-carbon-black.usage: Use for non-critical visual accents, borders, or large text headers.

muted-green-on-carbon-black.usage: Sophisticated, non-flashy success indicator passing AA contrast guidelines.
